content: We can frame Self-Refine as the *step-by-step iterative feedback mechanic* and Reflexion as the *long-term cumulative memory bank that contextualizes that feedback*, creating a two-layer autonomous improvement system where every small iterative refinement builds persistent, generalized self-knowledge rather than just improving a single output. This hybrid system would outperform either standalone approach by combining the efficient, training-free refinement of Self-Refine with Reflexion's ability to avoid repeating past mistakes across different tasks.
